headline: Is RPM Stock a Buy Now or a Hold After Its Latest Earnings Beat?
summary: RPM International's earnings beat and construction strength support the story, but inflation, DIY weakness and modest upside keep the stock in hold territory.

headline: Dividend Announcements: July 11-17, 2026
summary: CMI stands out with an Excellent quality score and a 10% dividend hike but trades at a 19% premium to fair value. Check out last week's dividend announcements here.
